sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَتْ مَدِينَةُ الرِّيَاضِ عَنْ حَمْلَةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِزِرَاعَةِ الْأَشْجَارِ.
sentences.translation: Grad Rijad najavio je novu kampanju sadnje drveća.
sentences.translationEn: The city of Riyadh announced a new campaign for planting trees.

sentences.arabic: تَهْدِفُ هَذِهِ الْمُبَادَرَةُ إِلَى تَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ الْهَوَاءِ فِي الْمَنَاطِقِ السَّكَنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova inicijativa ima za cilj poboljšanje kvalitete zraka u stambenim područjima.
sentences.translationEn: This initiative aims to improve air quality in residential areas.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الْمُتَطَوِّعِينَ فِي غَرْسِ الشُّجَيْرَاتِ الصَّغِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi volonteri učestvovali su u sadnji malih grmova.
sentences.translationEn: Many volunteers participated in planting small shrubs.

sentences.arabic: تُرِيدُ الْحُكُومَةُ أَنْ تُصْبِحَ الْمَدِينَةُ أَكْثَرَ اخْضِرَارًا فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada želi da grad postane zeleniji u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The government wants the city to become greener in the future.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعُ فِي حِمَايَةِ الْبِيئَةِ مِنَ التَّلَوُّثِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj projekat pomaže u zaštiti okoliša od zagađenja.
sentences.translationEn: This project helps protect the environment from pollution.
